postalAddress.source: (project convention: Parliament Office postal address used across many MPs when electorate office address unavailable)
postalAddress.notes: Parliament.nz MP contact page blocked by Radware captcha from this environment; Te Pāti Māori profile only references 'Parliament Buildings, Wellington' in authorisation line (no postal address). Using standard Parliament Office postal address as fallback.

donationMethod.details: No public, MP-specific donation method found. Te Pāti Māori provides a party donation (koha) form.
donationMethod.notes: Checked Te Pāti Māori koha/donation page.

sourcesChecked.notes: Blocked by Radware captcha / could not access contact details.
Profile page includes email and authorisation line but no postal address.
Te Pāti Māori party koha/donation form.
